description: Anima character LoRA with a specific outfit (LOCKED) — trigger_character is the subject (at the start), and the outfit is written ONLY as trigger_outfit, with no visual description (color/fabric/cut). Keeps the anima-character hybrid tags+prose format for pose/scene/light. Accepts a per-dataset custom instruction.

variables.name: trigger_character
variables.prompt: Character trigger name (e.g. aria, naruto_uzumaki) — placed at the START of every caption as the subject

variables.name: trigger_outfit
variables.prompt: Outfit trigger name (e.g. aria_beach, clown_suit) — written literally where clothing is mentioned, with NO visual description

variables.name: custom_instruction
variables.prompt: Optional operator instruction for the LLM on this specific outfit/dataset (leave empty to skip)
